bio.intro: With a solid background in software development, I have been working for almost three years at
bio.description: , enhancing skills in systems architecture, backend development, and agile practices.

chapterLeader.summary: Responsible for organizing and guiding technical discussions, managing time, and monitoring the smooth operation of weekly Workshops.
details: Organization of weekly meetings by department for knowledge and experience sharing.
Joint skill development with the team.

developer.summary: Development of solutions for an Exchange Broker, contributing to the continuous acceleration of the platform.
details: Using Vue.js (Quasar) for responsive and interactive interfaces.
Node.js and NestJS for robust services and APIs.
PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis for persistence and caching.
AWS (SQS, Lambda, ECS, Step Functions) for cloud infrastructure.

junior.summary: Working in agile environments with emphasis on Kanban, technical support, and solution development for a digital exchange broker.
details: Collection and analysis of requirements from internal and external stakeholders.
Documentation of functional and non-functional requirements.
Participation in agile teams for iterative and incremental deliveries.

junior.summary: Development for Agroevox and HOFacil clients, focusing on geospatial data and interactive maps.
details: Vue.js for intuitive and responsive interfaces.
Python with Flask for the server side.
MongoDB for geospatial data with GeoJSON.
Integration of maps and location data into the product.

intern.summary: Fullstack web development with Vue.js, Node.js, and MongoDB, focusing on learning and solving technical problems.
details: Creation of complete web applications (frontend + backend + database).
